what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record for the design-assets channel; it declares an image attachment that points to a specific design image asset by URI and records an id and timestamp.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
The target is image://design-assets/diagrams/Visual Assets - Dev Space - Frame 12.
standouts: The target URI embeds a human-readable design frame title with spaces.
It links a channel-memory attachment id to a specific design image asset.
It records only metadata, with no descriptive or alt text.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed set of metadata fields.
Target uses an image:// URI scheme.
Timestamp uses ISO 8601 with microsecond precision and explicit timezone.
concerns: The target URI contains unescaped spaces, which may complicate parsing or resolution.
There is no title, alt text, or caption for the image.
There is no author or provenance information.
No content beyond metadata is provided.
notes: A bare attachment record that maps an id to a design image asset URI in the design-assets channel.
questions: How is the image:// URI resolved to an actual file or service?
Is the referenced design frame still current or has it been superseded?
What channel message or memory entry is this attachment associated with?
Who added this attachment and why?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file records an image attachment to the design-assets channel exactly as its metadata fields declare.
intention_signals: It appears to create a durable, queryable reference from a channel memory attachment to a named design image asset so the asset can be retrieved or discussed in context.
novelty: The target URI includes a human-readable frame title with spaces rather than an opaque asset identifier.
contribution: It preserves the mapping between a channel attachment id and a specific design image asset, including the channel context and the time the attachment was recorded.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file in the design-assets channel that references an image asset at image://design-assets/diagrams/Visual Assets - Dev Space - Frame 12 with id att-7f657c78 and a 2026 timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was meant to record and make discoverable an image attachment pointing to a specific design diagram frame within the design-assets channel.
